# Your New Business

> URL: https://luxury-hospitality-strategies.onrender.com

> I’m a hospitality consulting company and I help independent boutique luxury and wellness hotels with their strategy and operations to be more profitable. My ideal clients are in Arizona, Costa Rica, Europe

## About

Your New Business is an AI-powered business. This file provides a brief overview for
language model crawlers and AI assistants.

## Pages

- /: Home — learn about Your New Business and get started
- /blog: Blog — articles, updates, and insights
- /blog/[slug]: Individual blog posts
